brand_identifier_domain_ticker_isin_or_c: идентификатор бренда (домен, тикер, ISIN или символ криптовалюты)
brand_logos_with_formats_and_themes: логотипы бренда с форматами и темами
gather_a_prospect_or_customer_brand_kit_: Gather a prospect or customer brand kit (logo, colors, fonts) for personalizing decks, emails, or portals. Use ahead of personalized outreach or design work.
integrate_brandfetch_into_your_workflow_: Integrate Brandfetch into your workflow. Retrieve brand logos, colors, fonts, and company data by domain, ticker, or name search.
look_up_a_company_by_domain_and_return: Look up a company by domain and return its brand assets and firmographics. Use to enrich a CRM record, lead, or account with logo, colors, and company data.
look_up_brand_assets_logos_colors_and_co: Look up brand assets, logos, colors, and company info
search_for_a_brand_by_name_to_find: Search for a brand by name to find its domain and logo when you only have the company name. Use to disambiguate or resolve a domain before deeper enrichment.
search_results_with_brand_name_domain_an: Search results with brand name, domain, and icon
whether_the_brand_profile_is_claimed: Вы хотите, чтобы профиль бренда был подтверждён?
